response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The vocal performance matches the lyrics from the reference JSON perfectly. 2. JSON Usage: Fully used the reference JSON for lyrics and translations, then manually transcribed and translated the post-performance talk part from 04:17 onwards. 3. Timing & Pacing: Added subtitle for the visual text (title card) at 00:20, and timing is tightly coupled to vocal bursts to avoid any cascading delays.

subtitles.original: 悪魔の踊り方
subtitles.english: [Title: Devil's Manner]

subtitles.original: 感情なんてもんはどうしても無駄だって悪魔は言った
subtitles.english: "Things like emotions are useless no matter what," so said the devil.

subtitles.original: 「何もかも捨てちまえよ」
subtitles.english: "Just throw away everything!"

subtitles.original: 嗚呼、快不快も、喜怒哀楽さえも！
subtitles.english: Ah, pleasure and displeasure, even your human emotions!

subtitles.original: どうしようもない事実、ヒトは終焉から逃れられない
subtitles.english: It's an inescapable truth, humans can't run away from their demise.

subtitles.original: 「誰も抗えない欲望に従え」
subtitles.english: "Obey the desires that no one can resist."

subtitles.original: 思考を休めるな 脳ミソを回せ
subtitles.english: Don't rest your mind, put those brains to action.

subtitles.original: 「誰もお前のことなど見ちゃいないさ」
subtitles.english: "No one is watching you or anything..."

subtitles.original: おかしくなってしまうことをどうして恥じる？
subtitles.english: Why are you embarrassed of becoming a bit strange?

subtitles.original: お前らに
subtitles.english: To you all...

subtitles.original: 完璧で間違った踊り方を教えてやるから
subtitles.english: I'll teach you all a perfect but mistaken way to dance,

subtitles.original: いっせーので捨てちまえ、そんな命ならば
subtitles.english: so if it's that kind of life, throw it away on "Ready, set, go!"

subtitles.original: 何十何百何千何万回学習しなさいな
subtitles.english: Learn it tens, hundreds, thousands, millions of times.

subtitles.original: どうしたってさ、空っぽの頭蓋骨だろ
subtitles.english: At any rate, your skull is empty.

subtitles.original: わかっているのかい？
subtitles.english: You understand that, right?

subtitles.original: 感情なんていつ何時でも邪魔だって悪魔は言った
subtitles.english: "Emotions are a nuisance every moment of your life," so said the devil.

subtitles.original: 「反論の余地などない」
subtitles.english: "There's no room for objections."

subtitles.original: 嗚呼、人生に意味を与えておくれ！
subtitles.english: Ah, grant meaning upon this human life!

subtitles.original: 420でさえも救えない終焉があると知った
subtitles.english: I knew that there's a demise that not even 420 could save me from.

subtitles.original: 「誰も疑わない神様を疑え」
subtitles.english: "Doubt the god that no one else questions."

subtitles.original: 思考を休めるな 脳ミソを回せ
subtitles.english: Don't rest your mind, put those brains to action.

subtitles.original: 「誰もお前のことなど見ちゃいないさ」
subtitles.english: "No one is watching you or anything..."

subtitles.original: 躊躇っている数秒の無益さを知れ
subtitles.english: Know of the futility of your few seconds of hesitation.

subtitles.original: お前らに
subtitles.english: To you all...

subtitles.original: 完璧で間違った踊り方を教えてやるから
subtitles.english: I'll teach you all a perfect but mistaken way to dance,

subtitles.original: いっせーので捨てちまえ、そんな命ならば
subtitles.english: so if it's that kind of life, throw it away on "Ready, set, go!"

subtitles.original: 何十何百何千何万回学習しなさいな
subtitles.english: Learn it tens, hundreds, thousands, millions of times.

subtitles.original: どうしたってさ、頭ん中空っぽなこと
subtitles.english: At any rate, the inside of your head is empty.

subtitles.original: わかっていないようだ
subtitles.english: And it seems you don't understand that.

subtitles.original: 承認欲にレイプされ、死んだ花をぶら下げている女
subtitles.english: A woman, hanging up dead flowers, raped by her want of recognition.

subtitles.original: 何かを愛すことすら、ままならないまま餌を待つだけ
subtitles.english: Without even having anything to love, she waits for her feed without having her way.

subtitles.original: 踊り方を知らない、芸術の価値などわからないやつらに
subtitles.english: For those who don't know how to dance, who don't understand the value of art,

subtitles.original: 堕落していれば 何も見えないまま
subtitles.english: if they fall into depravity, they'll see nothing at all.

subtitles.original: 真善美に背いた踊り方を教えてやるから
subtitles.english: I'll teach you a dance that goes against truth, goodness, and beauty,

subtitles.original: いっせーので狂っちまえ、惨めな姿で
subtitles.english: so in your miserable state, just go mad on "Ready, set, go!"

subtitles.original: 何十何百何千何万何億人の中でさぁ
subtitles.english: In the midst of those tens, hundreds, thousands, millions, billions of people,

subtitles.original: そうして埋もれていたっていいと どうして言えるのだろう？
subtitles.english: why can you say that you are fine with being buried?

subtitles.original: ねえ
subtitles.english: Hey,

subtitles.original: 世界が患っている狂信は
subtitles.english: the fanaticism that this world is afflicted with

subtitles.original: 健常者でさえ目が眩むような光を放っている
subtitles.english: lets out a light that makes even a healthy person dizzy.

subtitles.original: 今夜、悪魔がお前らにこう云うぜ
subtitles.english: Tonight, the devil will speak to you as such:

subtitles.original: 「神とやらに惑わされるなよ」
subtitles.english: "Don't let yourself be led astray by some god."

subtitles.original: はーい！
subtitles.english: Okay!

subtitles.original: 「悪魔の踊り方」歌わせていただきました！
subtitles.english: I sang "Akuma no Odorikata"!

subtitles.original: いや、「悪魔の踊り方」ってさ、すごいカッコいい曲じゃない？
subtitles.english: I mean, "Akuma no Odorikata" is such a cool song, isn't it?

subtitles.original: ああいうカッコいい歌うたうと、なんかちゃんと
subtitles.english: When I sing cool songs like that,

subtitles.original: 様になっているのかなって
subtitles.english: I wonder if I'm pulling it off well,

subtitles.original: なんか心細い気持ちに実はなってるんだよね。
subtitles.english: and I actually end up feeling a bit anxious.

subtitles.original: ちゃんとカッコよく歌えてたかな、僕？
subtitles.english: Did I manage to sing it coolly?

subtitles.original: はい、ということでね
subtitles.english: Right, and so...

subtitles.original: なんかもう、ここまであっという間だったよね。
subtitles.english: it really feels like it's been in the blink of an eye up to this point.

subtitles.original: もうこんな時間経ってるんだっていう感じでございますが。
subtitles.english: It really feels like, "Wow, has that much time passed already?"

subtitles.original: なんとですね、ここから告知タイムとさせていただきます！
subtitles.english: But guess what, from here on, we're going to have an announcement time!
